requirements.title: Beer Catalog & Search
requirements.description: Searchable, filterable database of 500+ craft beers available in Mexico.
acceptance: Users can search by name, style, brewery
Filter by ABV, style, region, rating

requirements.title: Community Ratings
requirements.description: Users can rate and review beers (1-5 stars + text).
acceptance: Submit rating with optional review text
Aggregate ratings displayed on beer page

requirements.title: Where to Buy / Find
requirements.description: Show locations where beers can be purchased or found.

requirements.title: Brewery Profiles
requirements.description: Detailed brewery information and beer lineup.
acceptance: Brewery details: origin, location, founded year
